name: Hybrid Kinetic Group Limited
summary: Hybrid Kinetic Group Limited, an investment holding company, develops and sells electric motor vehicles, battery management systems and spare parts, and batteries materials in the People's Republic of China. The company also researches and develops single and few-layer graphene for super batteries, electronic traction motor, and power electronic system for use in electric vehicles. In addition, it offers finance leasing services; and sells electric motor vehicles and components, such as powertrain system, as well as provides after-sale services. The company was formerly known as Far East Golden Resources Group Limited and changed its name to Hybrid Kinetic Group Limited in March 2010. Hybrid Kinetic Group Limited was incorporated in 1995 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
